content.text: Apply bugfix-6: Fixed all 5 static audit findings: cross-store audit log isolation (F1), true stored-value at-rest encryption with VARCHAR columns (F2), frontend audit trail UI (F3), missing run_app.sh (F4), and login credential disclosure removal (F5).

Fixed all 5 static audit findings: cross-store audit log isolation (F1), true stored-value at-rest encryption with VARCHAR columns (F2), frontend audit trail UI (F3), missing run_app.sh (F4), and login credential disclosure removal (F5).

Changes applied:
### F1 - Cross-store audit log isolation (HIGH)
- Added store_id column to audit_log table via migration 20260404_0013.
- Updated audit_event() to accept and persist store_id on all audit writes.
- Propagated store_id through all 28 audit_event() calls across 8 service files (loyalty, inventory, order, campaign, training, attendance, kpi, analytics).
- Rewrote /audit/* endpoints to enforce server-side store-scope filtering: store_manager users only see events for their own store or unscoped events.
- Added cross-store audit isolation test: manager102 cannot see store 101 events.
Files: repo/backend/app/db/models/audit.py, repo/backend/app/services/audit_service.py, repo/backend/app/api/v1/endpoints/audit.py, repo/backend/app/services/loyalty_service.py, repo/backend/app/services/inventory_service.py, repo/backend/app/services/order_service.py, repo/backend/app/services/campaign_service.py, repo/backend/app/services/training_service.py, repo/backend/app/services/attendance_service.py, repo/backend/alembic/versions/20260404_0013_audit_store_scope.py

### F2 - Stored-value at-rest encryption (HIGH)
- Converted wallet_accounts.balance, wallet_ledger.amount, wallet_ledger.balance_after, and points_ledger.pre_tax_amount from Numeric to VARCHAR(255) via migration 20260404_0014.
- All wallet writes now go through _encrypt_amount() producing Fernet ciphertext when FIELD_ENCRYPTION_KEY is configured.
- All wallet reads transparently decrypt via _decrypt_stored_amount().
- Updated seed_service.py to use string values for wallet/points columns.
- Added wallet encryption roundtrip test and end-to-end wallet credit/debit persistence tests.
Files: repo/backend/app/db/models/loyalty.py, repo/backend/app/services/loyalty_service.py, repo/backend/app/services/member_view_service.py, repo/backend/app/api/v1/endpoints/members.py, repo/backend/app/services/seed_service.py, repo/backend/alembic/versions/20260404_0014_wallet_encrypted_columns.py

### F3 - Frontend audit trail UI (MEDIUM)
- Added audit.ts API service client with typed methods for all audit endpoints.
- Added AuditTrailView.vue with category filter (all/member/campaign/order), action search, and data table.
- Added /app/audit route with administrator + store_manager role guard.
- Added 'Audit Trail' navigation entry.
Files: repo/frontend/src/services/audit.ts, repo/frontend/src/views/app/AuditTrailView.vue, repo/frontend/src/router/index.ts, repo/frontend/src/app/navigation.ts

### F4 - Missing run_app.sh (MEDIUM)
- Created run_app.sh startup helper script matching README reference.
- Runs docker compose up --build -d and prints service URLs.
Files: repo/run_app.sh

### F5 - Login credential disclosure (LOW)
- Removed default password hint text from LoginView.vue.
- Removed prefilled username/password defaults from form state.
- Removed seed user hint paragraph.
Files: repo/frontend/src/views/auth/LoginView.vue

Tests added:
- repo/backend/tests/test_security_hardening.py::test_manager_audit_events_scoped_to_own_store
- repo/backend/tests/test_security_hardening.py::test_admin_sees_all_audit_events
- repo/backend/tests/test_security_hardening.py::test_wallet_encryption_roundtrip_with_encryptor
- repo/backend/tests/test_security_hardening.py::test_wallet_credit_debit_flow_stores_correctly
- repo/backend/tests/test_security_hardening.py::test_wallet_insufficient_debit_rejected
